content: Completed my master's degree at NAIST.
My research paper "Closed-Form Coordinate Ascent Variational Inference for Student-t Process Regression with Student-t Likelihood" is accepted to AISTATS 2026.
Released torch-betainc v0.2.0 on PyPI - a fully-differentiable PyTorch implementation of the regularized incomplete beta function.
Released torch-betainc v0.1.0 on PyPI - a fully-differentiable PyTorch implementation of the regularized incomplete beta function.
Presented a poster at IBIS 2025 in Naha, Japan.
Started visiting researcher position at TU Munich.
Started working as a research assistant at Kyoto University.
